name_cn:
Top Quality
【Top Original】P House🌹🎉New 3-in-1🎉1B is here👏This mini envelope bag features a front flap, with a signature engraved logo adorning the front, showcasing the brand's style. The magnetic snap closure is classic, while the strap transforms it into a crossbody or shoulder bag, complete with a small coin purse for versatile use 😘😘. Soft lambskin lining features a small pocket with a removable mirror, a thoughtful design. Simple yet stylish, grab yours now🎉🎉🎉👏
Size: L20xH12xBase4cm!
